title: Standby ambient temperature with water in vessels
summary: Standby ambient temperature range when vessels and oil cooler contain water: 0°C to 50°C.
evidence_quote: ---容器和油冷中有水的温度：0℃ to 50℃

title: Standby ambient temperature without water in vessels
summary: Standby ambient temperature range when vessels and oil cooler are empty: -18°C to 60°C.
evidence_quote: ---容器和油冷中无水的温度：-18℃ to 60℃

title: Operating ambient temperature
summary: Operating ambient temperature range: 0°C to 40°C.
evidence_quote: 运行时机房温度： 0℃ to 40℃

title: Maximum condenser entering water temperature at start
summary: At start, condenser entering water temperature must not exceed design temperature by more than 2.7°C.
evidence_quote: 启动时冷凝器最高进水温度：比设计温度高 2.7℃

title: Minimum leaving chilled water temperature
summary: Minimum leaving chilled water temperature: 3.3°C.
evidence_quote: 最低冷冻水出水温度： 3.3℃

title: Minimum chilled liquid temperature with antifreeze
summary: Minimum chilled liquid temperature when using correct antifreeze: -9.4°C.
evidence_quote: 最低冷冻液体温度（含正确防冻液）：-9.4℃

title: Maximum entering chilled water temperature
summary: Maximum entering chilled water temperature: 32.2°C.
evidence_quote: 冷冻水最高进水温度： 32.2℃

title: Maximum oil cooler entering water temperature
summary: Maximum entering water temperature for oil cooler/VFD cooling: 32.2°C.
evidence_quote: 油冷/变频器冷却最高进水温度： 32.2℃

title: Minimum oil cooler entering water temperature
summary: Minimum entering water temperature for oil cooler/VFD cooling: 5.6°C.
evidence_quote: 油冷/变频器冷却最低进水温度： 5.6℃

title: Evaporator maximum entering water temperature
summary: Evaporator entering water temperature must not exceed 43°C to avoid safety valve opening and control damage.
evidence_quote: 蒸发器的进水温度不 得高于43℃，否则会造成安全阀开启制冷剂跑掉和损坏控制元件。

title: Guide vane opening/closing times
summary: Factory-set guide vane opening and closing times: CE063-CE100 3-5 min open, 1-2 min close; CE126 5-8 min open, 1-2 min close.

structured_payload.value: CE063-CE100: open 3-5 min, close 1-2 min; CE126: open 5-8 min, close 1-2 min

evidence_quote:
压缩机型号 开启时间 关闭时间
CE063-CE100        3-5 min        1-2 min
CE126        5-8 min        1-2 min

title: Oil temperature control range
summary: Temperature control valve maintains oil temperature between 35°C and 41°C.
evidence_quote: 温度控制阀控制油温在 35ºC-41ºC之间。

title: Hot gas bypass activation current setpoint
summary: Factory-set hot gas bypass activation point is 40% of full load current.
evidence_quote: 出厂时设置的机组热气旁通启动 点电流值为满负荷时电流的40%.

title: Design pressure refrigerant side WSC/WCC/HSC
summary: Refrigerant side design pressure for WSC/WCC/HSC: 1400 kPa.
evidence_quote: 在WSC/WCC/HSC中制冷剂侧的设计压力为1400kPa

title: Design pressure refrigerant side WDC
summary: Refrigerant side design pressure for WDC: 1300 kPa (evaporator) and 1600 kPa (condenser).
evidence_quote: 在WSC/WCC/HSC中制冷剂侧的设计压力为1400kPa，WDC中则为1300kPa。

title: Design pressure water side
summary: Water side design pressure for all models: 1000 kPa.
evidence_quote: 在WSC/WCC/HSC/WDC中水侧的设计压力为1000kPa。

title: Approved synthetic lubricant
summary: Approved synthetic ester oil for R-134a: Mobil Artic EAL46 or Ici Emkarate RL32H, McQuay part number Z1502109.

structured_payload.value: Mobil Artic EAL46 or Ici Emkarate RL32H, McQuay PN Z1502109

evidence_quote:
润滑指示 Mobil Artic EAL46 ；
Ici Emkarate RL32H(2)
McQuay部件号码   Z1502109

title: Minimum condenser entering water temperature for operation
summary: McQuay chillers can operate with condenser entering water temperature as low as 55°F (12.8°C) while providing lower leaving water temperature.
evidence_quote: McQuay机组在冷凝器进水温度55℉ (12.8℃)时也能提供较低的机组出水温度。

title: Oil filter replacement for CE063 and larger compressors
summary: Isolate filter by closing oil pump discharge service valve, remove filter housing, replace element and gasket, reopen valve.

structured_payload.procedure: Close oil pump discharge service valve, remove filter housing, replace element and gasket, reopen valve.

evidence_quote: 对于这些机器，将过滤器隔离开来就可以更换，关闭油泵排油管上的维修阀，移去过滤器外壳，会有一些泡沫产生，但止逆阀会限制从其它压缩机腔来的泄漏，移去过滤器，更换新元件和外壳，采用新垫片，重新打开油泵排气管上的阀。

title: Seasonal shutdown water drainage
summary: When ambient below freezing, disconnect cooling and chilled water, drain all water from vessels, and optionally blow dry air through condenser and evaporator.

structured_payload.procedure: Disconnect cooling and chilled water, drain all water from vessels, blow dry air through condenser and evaporator.

evidence_quote: 当机组安装在环境温度低于冰点温度的区域，冷却水和冷冻水须与系统脱开，并排空容器中所有的水。最好向冷凝器和蒸发气中吹送干燥的空气有助于机组内水分的排空

title: Motor insulation resistance check
summary: Check compressor motor insulation resistance to ground every six months; readings of 5 MΩ or less indicate possible insulation failure.

structured_payload.procedure: Check insulation resistance to ground every six months; if 5 MΩ or less, further inspection needed.

evidence_quote: 压缩机马达对地绝缘电阻半年检查一次并作好记录，记录指示了绝缘破坏情况。如果读数为5MΩ或以下表明绝缘层可能失效，必须作进一步检查。

title: Pump speed recommendation to avoid resonance
summary: Avoid 3600/3000 rpm (2-pole) pumps due to noise and vibration; recommend 1450 rpm (4-pole) for 50 Hz or 1750 rpm for 60 Hz.

structured_payload.guidance: Use 1450 rpm (50 Hz) or 1750 rpm (60 Hz) 4-pole pumps; avoid 2-pole pumps.

evidence_quote: 不要使用 3600或者3000转/分或者两极电机水泵（对 50Hz电源而言），因为这种泵常伴有过大的噪音和振动。

title: Oil cooler water source temperature limit
summary: Oil cooler water source must be clean and not exceed 27°C; chilled water or city water can be used.

structured_payload.guidance: Oil cooler water temperature must not exceed 27°C.

evidence_quote: 油冷水源必须是冷冻水或者是足够洁净或者可靠的水，温度不能高于27度，例如自来水。

title: Flow switch contact requirements
summary: Flow switch normally open contacts must be suitable for 24 VAC, 16 mA low current, and wiring must be separated from high voltage conductors.

structured_payload.guidance: Use N.O. contacts rated for 24 VAC, 16 mA; separate from high voltage wiring.

evidence_quote: 水流开关的常开接触器必须接于端子之间，其常开接触器必须适合24V交流电，16mA低电流。水流开关接线必须与其它高电压导体隔离开来（115V或更高）。

title: Compressor motor connection requirements
summary: Compressor motor connections must use copper conductors and copper compression lugs; for voltages ≥600V, terminals must be insulated after connection.

structured_payload.guidance: Use copper conductors and copper compression lugs; insulate terminals for ≥600V.

evidence_quote: 到压缩机电机的连接电 缆必须使用铜线和铜冷压端头。

title: Control power transformer sizing
summary: Control power transformer capacity: 3 kVA, with inrush capacity of 12 kVA at 80% power factor and 95% secondary voltage.

structured_payload.guidance: Transformer capacity 3 kVA, inrush 12 kVA at 80% PF and 95% secondary voltage.

evidence_quote: 提供控制电源的 变压器，容量为3kVA，在功率因素为80%，次级电压95%时冲击容量为12kVA。

title: Maximum voltage unbalance warning
summary: Voltage unbalance exceeding 2% will cause 6 to 10 times current unbalance; strictly limit supply voltage unbalance.

structured_payload.guidance: Keep voltage unbalance ≤ 2% to avoid excessive current unbalance.

evidence_quote: 超过2%的电压不平衡将导致 6到10倍的电流不平衡！需要严格限制电源电压的不平衡率。

title: Guide vane control logic
summary: To load (open vanes): SA de-energized, SB energized. To unload (close vanes): SB de-energized, SA energized. To hold: both de-energized.

structured_payload.sequence: Load: SA off, SB on; Unload: SB off, SA on; Hold: both off.

evidence_quote: 开启导叶（压缩机增载）电磁阀SA断电、SB得电。...关闭导叶（压缩机减载）电磁阀SB断电、SA得电。...当电磁阀SA、SB都断电，高压油通过SA、SB口流向活塞两边，导叶保持原来的位置

title: Oil heater operation
summary: Oil heater must be energized whenever compressor is off; it de-energizes when compressor starts.

structured_payload.sequence: Heater on when compressor off; heater off when compressor starts.

evidence_quote: 当压缩机不工作时，加热器必须带电，当压缩机起动时，加热器掉电。

title: Surge and stall detection
summary: A temperature sensor on the compressor shuts down the unit when surge or stall occurs, preventing damage from high noise and vibration.

structured_payload.rule: If surge/stall detected by temperature sensor, unit shuts down.

evidence_quote: 在压缩机上装配了一个温度传感器，当发生以上情况时会将机组关闭。

title: Check superheat for refrigerant charge or expansion valve issues
summary: Record compressor suction temperature monthly; significant increase in superheat over time indicates refrigerant leak or faulty expansion valve. Correct superheat at full load: 1.5–2°F (1°C).

structured_payload.step: Monitor suction superheat; if it increases significantly, check for leaks or expansion valve fault.

evidence_quote: 一个月最少要记录一次压缩机吸气温度。从吸气温度及吸气压力对应的饱和温度可得到过热度，一段时间后过热度的显著增大表示制冷剂泄漏或膨胀阀可能损坏，满负荷下正确的过热度为1.5—2 ºF(1 ºC)

title: Typical full load discharge superheat
summary: At full load, discharge superheat is typically 14–16°F (8–9°C).
evidence_quote: 满负荷下过热度为14—16 ºF(8—9 ºC)。

title: Typical approach temperature for McQuay high-efficiency heat exchangers
summary: McQuay high-efficiency heat exchangers have a very low approach temperature, generally 0.6–0.8°C.
evidence_quote: McQuay的高效换热器具有相当低的接近温差，一般为0.6-0.8度。

title: Pumpdown procedure
summary: Ensure water flow through evaporator and condenser, close all liquid line valves, start compressor in manual mode, open guide vanes to avoid surge, stop at ~20 psi (138 kPa).

structured_payload.procedure: Ensure water flow, close liquid line valves, start compressor in manual, open guide vanes, stop at ~20 psi (138 kPa).

evidence_quote: 在抽储过程中需要确保充足的水量通过蒸发器和冷凝器，同时关闭所有液态管路上的截止阀。在所有截止阀关闭，水流建立以后，启动压缩机。将MicroTech设置为手动模式，在抽储过程中，导叶必须打开以避免喘振或其他异常情况。在大约20psi(138kPa)时，MicroTech停止抽储操作。

title: Leak test procedure
summary: Charge with enough R-134a to reach 10 psi (69 kPa), then add dry nitrogen to maximum 125 psi (860 kPa); use electronic leak detector (halide torch not suitable for R-134a).

structured_payload.procedure: Charge R-134a to 10 psi (69 kPa), add nitrogen to 125 psi (860 kPa), use electronic leak detector.

evidence_quote: 首先向系统充注足够的制冷剂使系统压力达到10PSI（69kPa），然后充注干燥氮气使最大压力为125PSI（ 860kPa），然后用电子检漏仪进行检测，卤素检漏仪不能检测R-134a。

title: Evacuation procedure
summary: Use vacuum pump capable of 67 Pa; if unable to reach 67 Pa, perform triple evacuation: evacuate to ~20 mmHg, break vacuum with dry nitrogen to 0 Pa, repeat three times.

structured_payload.procedure: Evacuate to 67 Pa; if not possible, triple evacuate to ~20 mmHg, break with nitrogen to 0 Pa, repeat 3 times.

evidence_quote: 真空泵的抽空能力要能够达到67Pa。...如果真空泵不能获得67Pa，可以采用3倍抽空方式。系统第一次抽空到绝对压力大约为20mmHg，然后将干燥的氮气充入系统，将系统的相对压力增加到0Pa。...这样的操作重复3次。

title: Refrigerant charging procedure
summary: Connect refrigerant cylinder to main liquid line service valve, purge air, open valve; if system under vacuum, keep cylinder upright and charge vapor; if pressure above freezing, invert cylinder and charge liquid into condenser.

structured_payload.procedure: Connect to liquid line valve, purge air, charge vapor if vacuum, liquid if pressure above freezing.

evidence_quote: 将制冷剂储罐与主供液管处的截止阀接头口用连接软管连接，排空截止阀与储罐连接管道中的空气，然后将管路中的阀打开至中间位置，进行充注。...如果系统处于真空状态，将制冷剂储罐竖立放置，连接处在储罐上方，然后打开储罐充注制冷剂...如果压力平衡，难以注入，可稍微对储罐进行加热...系统的气体压力大于或等于冰点温度，将储罐倒置使储罐的温度高于冷凝器温度。

title: Safety valve pressure settings and relief capacities
summary: McQuay centrifugal safety valves set at 180 psi (1242 kPa), 200 psi (1380 kPa), 225 psi (1552 kPa) with relief capacities 68.5, 75.5, 84.4 # air/min respectively.

structured_payload.value: 180 psi (1242 kPa) / 68.5 # air/min; 200 psi (1380 kPa) / 75.5 # air/min; 225 psi (1552 kPa) / 84.4 # air/min

evidence_quote: McQuay 离心机组安全阀的压力设置 为180 psi（ 1242kPa），200 psi(1380kPa) ，225 psi(1552kPa)三种，其各自的排气量为68.5 # air/min, 75.5 # air/min, and 84.4 # air/min。

title: Insulation material specification
summary: Insulation must be UL-approved, 19 mm thick, ABS/PVC flexible foam; tube sheet insulation applied to prevent condensation, coated with epoxy elastic paint.

structured_payload.guidance: Use 19 mm thick ABS/PVC flexible foam, UL-approved, with epoxy elastic paint coating.

evidence_quote: 保温材料必须通过UL认证。保温材料为19mm厚并且其表面为ABS/PVC柔性泡沫。管板保温是按照实际尺寸制作并且粘贴到到位以防止冷凝水，然后涂上环氧弹性漆以防止破裂。
